mapper.select: SELECT bz_specification.id AS bid, bz_specification.specName, bz_specification.productTypeId, bz_specification_option.id AS oid, bz_specification_option.optionName, bz_specification_option.specId FROM bz_specification LEFT JOIN bz_specification_option ON bz_specification.id = bz_specification_option.specId WHERE bz_specification.id = #{id}

SELECT bz_specification.id AS bid, bz_specification.specName, bz_specification.productTypeId, bz_specification_option.id AS oid, bz_specification_option.optionName, bz_specification_option.specId FROM bz_specification LEFT JOIN bz_specification_option ON bz_specification.id = bz_specification_option.specId WHERE bz_specification.productTypeId = #{productTypeId}
